package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/xml"
	"io"
)

// scenario for xml_decoder_without_entity_limit: `xml.NewDecoder(r)` processing untrusted XML without setting `d.Entity = nil` and without input size limits
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario749Positive(reader io.Reader, target any) error {
	decoder := xml.NewDecoder(reader)
	return decoder.Decode(target)
}
